name: openmoe.ai BFT Council
description: openmoe.ai — EU AI Act compliance MCP server with Byzantine-fault-tolerant (BFT) consensus over MoE routing. Scores high-risk AI system conformity against Articles 9-15, validates A2A Agent Cards, runs red-team scans, and adds BFT consensus over MoE routing. AI governance / agent compliance audit (DORA, NIS2, CRA aware).

skills.name: EU AI Act Conformity Score
skills.description: Score high-risk AI system conformity against EU AI Act Articles 9 (risk management), 10 (data governance), 11 (technical documentation), 12 (record-keeping), 13 (transparency), 14 (human oversight), 15 (accuracy, robustness, cybersecurity). Returns 0-1 score with evidence trail per article.
examples: Score my HR screening AI for EU AI Act Article 9-15 conformity
Run a red-team scan against my model
Validate the A2A Agent Card for my agent system

skills.name: BFT Consensus over MoE Routing
skills.description: Byzantine-fault-tolerant consensus layer over Mixture-of-Experts routing. 5 expert voters reach 3-of-5 consensus before any routing decision. Tolerates f=2 faulty experts in a 2f+1=5 quorum.
examples: Route my prompt through BFT MoE consensus
Verify BFT consensus proof for a routing decision
